channel.title: Jancane on Neueste Angebote
channel.description: Recent content in Jancane on Neueste Angebote

item.title: Jancane - WiFi Extender Booster WiFi Repeater WLAN Verstärker WiFi Extender bis zu 5000sq.ft Mit Repeater/AP Modus Long Range Amplifier mit Ethernet Port zu Allen WLAN Geräten 1-Key Setup Access Point
item.description:
Sie können Jancane - WiFi Extender Booster WiFi Repeater WLAN Verstärker WiFi Extender bis zu 5000sq.ft Mit Repeater/AP Modus Long Range Amplifier mit Ethernet Port zu Allen WLAN Geräten 1-Key Setup Access Point hier:

ℹ️:

  • 【One touch setup】Tap WPS to connect to your device within 1 minute. Wall plug design and portability. Or use the web browser on your smartphone/tablet/PC for settings. Setup is simple according to the user manual without complicated steps and techniques.
  • 【Safe Internet environment】This WiFi extender can maximise network security and solve your network security problem. It plays an effective role in preventing others from stealing your network, protecting your important data and avoiding Wi-Fi interference and data protection issues. Support wireless security: WPA/WPA2 Ideal for use at home, business and travel.
  • 【Super Signal Coverage】High speed and long range to increase wireless coverage in all Wi-Fi networks, extend the WiFi signal into dead zones, create a stronger signal with a transmission rate of up to 300Mbps. You can play online games, video conferencing and even 4K HD video anytime and anywhere at home.
  • 【Comprehensive compatibility】compatible with all wireless network devices that comply with the 802.11N/B/G protocol, routers, modems and WiFi devices such as smartphones, tablets, laptops, smart TVs, etc.
  • 【Supports 2 modes】The WiFi extender has Ethernet ports with repeater/AP and can easily transform your wired Internet connection into a wireless access point. Most home users set it up in one of the two ways: Range Extender (it connects wirelessly to your existing wireless network and amplifies/extends the signal) or Access Point (it connects to the Internet or your existing network via Ethernet and then sends the wireless signal).

🛒 Hier!!

Check the price of this item in other countries:
